name: pinmark
description: A minimal yet powerful bookmark manager for Chrome — organize, browse, search, and clean up your bookmarks with ease. Supports multiple languages.

scripts.build:website: npm run build && mkdir -p dist-website && cp -r website/* dist-website/ && rm -f dist-website/pinmark-chrome.zip && cd .output/chrome-mv3 && zip -r "../../dist-website/pinmark-chrome.zip" . -x '*.DS_Store'
